name: @tagspaces/marp-viewer
description: A TagSpaces extension for viewing Marp markdown presentations.

scripts.build-libs: echo 'import Marp from "@marp-team/marp-core"; window.Marp = Marp;' | npx esbuild --bundle --outfile=libs/marp-core.bundle.js --format=iife --global-name=MarpModule --platform=browser --target=es2020 --minify && cp node_modules/@marp-team/marp-core/lib/browser.js libs/marp-browser.js
